name: context-menu
title: Context Menu
description: Unstyled context menu component with submenu, trigger, portal, positioner, popup, items, groups, radio, checkbox, built on Base UI

files.content:
import { tv } from "@/registry/bare/lib/tv.config";

export const contextMenuStyles = tv({
  slots: {
    trigger: [""],
    submenuTrigger: [""],
    portal: [""],
    backdrop: [""],
    positioner: [""],
    popup: [""],
    arrow: [""],
    item: [""],
    linkItem: [""],
    group: [""],
    groupLabel: [""],
    radioGroup: [""],
    radioItem: [""],
    radioItemIndicator: [""],
    checkboxItem: [""],
    checkboxItemIndicator: [""],
  },
});

export * as ContextMenu from "./index.parts";
export { contextMenuStyles } from "./styles";
